vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal
Vehicle context: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

generated_parts.label: Base Joint (J1)

verify.rule: All required fields are present.
Total mass must not exceed 2kg.
Each part_tree/internal_feature has corresponding geometry_ops.
Adjacent interfaces are named and reciprocal.
Critical joints have visible locking and preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on the base plate due to high torque.
risk.mit: Implement thermal analysis and add cooling fins if necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient cable strain relief leading to premature failure.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have proper strain relief geometry.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate heat dissipation from the motor.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the heat sink or improve its design.

physics_paths.description: Transmit payload forces to base plate
Motor torque to harmonic drive rotation
Motor heat dissipation to heat sink
Power and control signals from controller to motor

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate heat sink with base plate for better thermal management
Combine sensor pocket with access window for easier maintenance

manufacturing_strategy.process: CNC machining for base plate and mounting holes, LPBF for heat sink and motor mount
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Coordinate measurement machine (CMM) for dimensional accuracy

verification_focus.description: Ensure total mass does not exceed 2kg
Verify base plate can withstand 100Nm torque
Confirm heat sink dissipates motor heat effectively

physics_paths.path: Cable conduit from Link 2-3 to Link 3-4
Heat dissipation from motor to environment
Joint rotation between Link 2-3 and Link 3-4

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate parts while maintaining service access and inspection paths.
Ensure fastener patterns, pin joints, slots, bosses, and mating clearances are explicitly represented.
Ensure design includes callouts, access windows, labels, datum pads, and verification focus.
State locking method and torque/preload intent for critical joints.
Use inserts or bosses with adequate engagement depth for threaded connections.
Include visible joint service evidence such as axis rings and encoder covers.
Ensure cable routing is externally accessible or inspectable through open channels.
Ensure joint cartridges can be removed without cutting printed links.
Show bearing seat with shoulder or retaining feature for each joint.
Provide harness slack loops and strain relief at joint crossings.

manufacturing_strategy.process: CNC milling + LPBF for complex internal features
manufacturing_strategy.support_orientation: Vertical orientation for optimal support structure
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for surface finish and dimensional accuracy
